reviews.comment:
No me fue bien. En enero fui dos veces y no había Infinia, mucha cola y no avisan del faltante. O sea tuve espera para no cargar.
Al que viaje, bajar y consultar si disponen del combustible que necesitan.
A dos cuadras hay una YPF.

(Translated by Google)
It wasn't a good experience. I went twice in January and they didn't have Infinia, there were long lines, and they don't announce the shortage. So I ended up waiting and not filling up. If you're traveling, get out and ask if they have the fuel you need. There's a YPF station two blocks away.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR0bi0yZUx3EAE

reviews.comment:
Tiene una Full, recibe todos los medios de pago, en este momento no tenía Ultra. Es la primer YPF de la Pampa

(Translated by Google)
It's a full-service station, accepts all forms of payment, and currently doesn't have an ultra-service station. It's the first YPF station in La Pampa.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR0aDR6TDB3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Lo importante,si estás viajando,no cenaste y tenés ganas de una minuta salada Hamburguesas,pizza algo Hasta mediodía nada

(Translated by Google)
The important thing is, if you're traveling, haven't had dinner, and you're craving something savory like hamburgers or pizza, nothing until noon.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR0ZzdfblJ3EAE

reviews.comment:
Que poner de una estacion de servicio? Pasé de ida y de regreso,.cargué combustible, atendieron bien, solo que ambas veces habia mucha fila, asi que por eso saque una estrella.

(Translated by Google)
What to say about this gas station? I went there and back, filled up, the service was good, but both times there was a long line, so that's why I gave it one star.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR0X3F1QU1nEAE

reviews.comment:
Horrible el café y encima se ponen densos porque mi perrito entra al salón cada vez que le abren la puerta. Pretenden que lo esté sacando a cada rato... Hasta se atrevieron a ALZARLO Y SACARLO...
A ver si cambiamos esa odiosa regla anti-mascotas.!!

(Translated by Google)
The coffee is horrible, and on top of that, they're being stubborn because my little dog comes into the living room every time they open the door. They expect me to keep taking him out... They even dared to PICK HIM UP AND TAKE HIM OUT...
Let's see if we can change that odious anti-pet rule!!

reviewReply.comment: Buenas tardes . Cartel acceso tienda full . Prohibido mascotas . Estaba en presencia y el perro andaba entre gondolas y la gente . Disculpe las molestias pero respetamos los reglamentos.

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR0NnA3b3JRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Para los que somos de Buenos Aires el precio de la nafta es mucho más barato

(Translated by Google)
For those of us from Buenos Aires, the price of gasoline is much cheaper.
